changes.v1: Clara to offer transfer to Ben if caller insists, using his new personal number (once active).
changes.v2: Initially, calls will forward to Clara if not answered or declined from Ben's main line. Once Ben's second personal number is active, Clara will be the first point of contact for the main business line and transfer to Ben's second number as needed.

changes.v1: Take message and inform caller they will be contacted the next business day for non-emergency calls.
changes.v2: For all customers except the specific property manager, callers will be informed that the business will get back to them on the next business day. For emergency calls from the specific property manager, calls will be patched through.

changes.v1: Clara acts as first point of contact, handles inquiries, and transfers to Ben's second number if the caller insists on speaking to a person.
changes.v2: Clara will answer incoming calls. If a customer requests to speak with a person, Clara will transfer the call to Ben's designated transfer number. Clara will mention the service call fee ($115 call out, then $98/hr billed in half-hour increments at $49) if asked by the caller.
